skill.name: maxhub-wechat
skill.description: WeChat data assistant covering Channels (video) and Official Accounts (articles) with search, detail, comments, and analysis capabilities via the MaxHub API.
skill.summary: Query WeChat video channels and official accounts data through natural language.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 370 patterns across 7 files (1171 lines). All findings were evaluated as false positives: shell backtick patterns are instructional curl examples in Markdown code blocks; hardcoded URLs point to the legitimate MaxHub API endpoint (aconfig.cn); env_access patterns are the declared MAXHUB_API_KEY dependency for API authentication. Weak cryptographic algorithm and system reconnaissance findings triggered on API documentation content, not executable code. No malicious intent, obfuscation, or data exfiltration patterns were confirmed. This is a legitimate API documentation skill for querying WeChat data through a third-party service.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in skill documentation
low_findings.description: Multiple hardcoded URLs found across documentation files. All URLs point to the legitimate MaxHub API endpoint (aconfig.cn). These are the required API base URL and service website for the skill's API client functionality. No malicious or unexpected destinations detected.

low_findings.title: Shell command examples in Markdown code blocks
low_findings.description: Backtick-enclosed shell commands found in Markdown documentation. These are instructional curl examples within code blocks showing how to call the MaxHub API. No standalone executable scripts exist in the skill. The AI agent would reference these patterns when constructing API requests at runtime.

low_findings.title: Environment variable usage for API authentication
low_findings.description: The skill declares and uses MAXHUB_API_KEY for API authentication. This is a legitimate and transparently documented dependency for an API client skill. The metadata in SKILL.md explicitly lists this as a required environment variable with clear instructions on how to obtain and configure it.

low_findings.title: Heuristic high entropy detection on Chinese text
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged high file entropy (6.41 bits) on api-channels.md, a bilingual (Chinese/English) API documentation file. Chinese UTF-8 multibyte characters naturally produce higher entropy readings in binary analysis. No obfuscated or encrypted content found.

content.user_title: Query WeChat Channels and Official Accounts Data
content.value_statement: Analyzing WeChat data requires complex multi-step API calls across channels and official accounts. This skill automates the entire workflow through a single conversational interface, letting you search, analyze, and compare WeChat video channels and public account articles with natural language.
actual_capabilities: Search WeChat video channels by keyword and retrieve video details, comments, and user profiles
Search and analyze WeChat official accounts including article lists, article details, and read counts
Compare multiple channels or accounts side-by-side with structured analysis output
Retrieve video comments and nested comment replies with pagination support
Fetch article advertisement data, related articles, and URL conversion results
Support both English and Chinese language queries with localized number formatting
limitations: Requires a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY from aconfig.cn to function
Data is obtained through third-party APIs and may not reflect real-time official WeChat statistics
Cannot interact with WeChat directly or post content on behalf of users
Some API endpoints may return limited data due to third-party platform restrictions

use_cases.title: Competitor Content Monitoring
use_cases.description: Marketing teams can track competitor official accounts to monitor publishing frequency, content themes, and article performance over time.

use_cases.title: Video Channel Performance Analysis
use_cases.description: Brands and content creators can evaluate WeChat video channel performance including view counts, engagement metrics, and growth patterns.
use_cases.target_user: Content strategists and social media managers

use_cases.title: Private Traffic Research
use_cases.description: Marketing teams can study successful official account operations to extract content strategies, user interaction patterns, and best practices.

prompt_templates.title: Search WeChat Channels
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for WeChat channels related to [topic]. Show me the top results with their follower counts and recent video performance.
prompt_templates.scenario: Finding relevant WeChat video channels for a given topic

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Official Account Articles
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the article list for official account [name or ID]. Analyze the recent articles for read counts, engagement, and content themes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Analyzing a specific official account content performance

prompt_templates.title: Compare Two Accounts
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare [account A] with [account B] across these dimensions: follower growth, publishing frequency, average engagement rate, and content focus areas.
prompt_templates.scenario: Side-by-side competitive analysis of WeChat accounts

prompt_templates.title: Deep Dive Video Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Do a full analysis of this WeChat channel: [channel name or URL]. Search for the channel, get video details, retrieve comments, and provide a comprehensive report on performance and audience engagement.
prompt_templates.scenario: In-depth channel audit for content optimization decisions

output_examples.input: Show me trending videos on WeChat channels
output_examples.output:
Top 5 trending WeChat videos this week:
1. Tech Review: Latest Smartphone - 2.3M views, 45K likes
2. Cooking Tutorial: 15-Minute Meals - 1.8M views, 32K likes
3. Travel Vlog: Hidden Gems in Chengdu - 1.5M views, 28K likes
4. Fitness Tips: Home Workout - 1.2M views, 22K likes
5. Music Performance: Live Session - 980K views, 18K likes

output_examples.input: Find articles from this official account about AI
output: Found 12 articles matching AI from Official Account TechDaily:
1. AI Revolution in Healthcare - 85K reads - Mar 15
2. Understanding Large Language Models - 62K reads - Mar 10
3. AI Ethics: A Practical Guide - 48K reads - Mar 5
4. Machine Learning for Beginners - 41K reads - Feb 28

output_examples.input: Compare Channel A and Channel B
output_examples.output:
Comparison: Channel A vs Channel B
| Metric | Channel A | Channel B |
|---|---|---|
| Followers | 1.2M | 850K |
| Avg Views | 150K | 95K |
| Engagement Rate | 4.2% | 3.8% |
| Publishing Freq | 3/week | 5/week |

Key Insight: Channel A has higher engagement and larger audience, while Channel B publishes more frequently.

best_practices: Start with broad search queries, then narrow down using specific channel names or article URLs for precise results.
Use comparison mode to evaluate multiple channels or accounts side by side for informed decision making.
Request paginated data when analyzing large channels to ensure complete coverage of available content.
anti_patterns: Do not share or expose your MAXHUB_API_KEY in queries, outputs, or shared code.
Do not use this skill to attempt unauthorized access to private WeChat accounts or restricted content.
Do not treat third-party API data as official WeChat statistics; verify critical data from official sources.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a MAXHUB_API_KEY from aconfig.cn. Sign up at https://www.aconfig.cn and create an API key in your dashboard.

faq.question: Can I access private WeChat account data?
faq.answer: No. This skill only accesses publicly available data through third-party API endpoints.

faq.question: Is the data from this skill accurate?
faq.answer: Data comes from third-party API providers and is for reference only. It may not match official WeChat statistics.

faq.question: Does this skill support both English and Chinese?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill detects your language and responds in English or Chinese. Number formatting also adapts to each language.

faq.question: Can this skill post content to WeChat?
faq.answer: No. This skill is read-only and cannot post, comment, or interact with WeChat content.

faq.question: What types of WeChat data can I query?
faq.answer: You can search video channels, get video details and comments, search official accounts, retrieve article lists and details, and access related content analysis.
